map.//: Naming Convention = SITE NAME/ADDRESS : ASSET TYPE : SERIAL
map.autoname: formulatext: CASE WHEN {custrecord_nx_asset_type.id} = 1 THEN {custrecord_nx_asset_address_text} ELSE NVL2({custrecord_nx_asset_type}, {custrecord_nx_asset_type}||' : '||{custrecord_nx_asset_serial},{custrecord_nx_asset_serial}) END

models/project.//: customform = internal ID of project form to be used when NextService creates projects. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/case.//: customform = internal ID of case form to be used when NextService creates cases. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

prototype.//: customform = internal ID of task form to be used when NextService creates tasks. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/time.//: customform = internal ID of time form to be used when NextService creates timebills. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/quote.//: customform = internal ID of quote form to be used when NextService creates quotes within Netsuite. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/salesorder.//: customform = internal ID of sales order form to be used when NextService creates sales orders via consumables. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/itemfulfillment.//: customform = internal ID of item fulfillment form to be used when NextService creates item fulfillments. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/invoice.//: customform = internal ID of invoice form to be used when NextService creates invoices. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/expensereport.//: customform = internal ID of expense report form to be used when NextService creates expense reports. Note that defaults can only be hard coded, event map is not invoked as these scripts are run in Netsuite, not the mobile

models/transaction.//: retains values of these fields on transactions where the project field is updated as Netsuite behaviour sometimes resets these values when the project is set

map.selected: formulatext:case when {custentity_nx_project_type.id} in (9) then '2' when {custentity_nx_project_type.id} in (10) then '3' when {custentity_nx_project_type.id} in (11,12,13,14,15) then '4' else '' end

task.//: Project Type = Billable, Rule 1 - Consumables Billable, Timebills Billable, Expenses Billable for all Case and Task Types

item.map: formulatext:case when ${ task.billing } in (3,4,7,8) then 'F' else 'T' end

category.map: formulatext:case when ${ task.billing } in (2,4,6,8) then 'F' else 'T' end

item.map: formulatext:case when ${ task.billing } in (5,6,7,8) then 'F' else 'T' end

map.label: formulatext:nvl2({case.custevent_nx_case_type}, {case.custevent_nx_case_type}||' ', '')||coalesce({custevent_nx_customer.companyname},trim({custevent_nx_customer.firstname}||' '||{custevent_nx_customer.lastname}),{custevent_nx_task_type})
map.body:
formulatext:nvl2({case.casenumber}, '

Case Number: '||{case.casenumber}||'

Case Type: '||{case.custevent_nx_case_type}||'

', '')||nvl2({case.custevent_nx_case_details}, '

Case Details: '||case when length(regexp_replace(trim({case.custevent_nx_case_details}),'['||CHR(13)||']','
')) > 1900 then substr(regexp_replace(trim({case.custevent_nx_case_details}),'['||CHR(13)||']','
'),0,1900)||' ...' else regexp_replace(trim({case.custevent_nx_case_details}),'['||CHR(13)||']','
') end|| '

', '')|| nvl2({custevent_nx_task_number}, '

Task Number: '||{custevent_nx_task_number}||'

Task Type: '||{custevent_nx_task_type}||'

', '')||nvl2({message}, '

Task Details: '||case when length(regexp_replace(trim({message}),'['||CHR(13)||']','
')) > 1900 then substr(regexp_replace(trim({message}),'['||CHR(13)||']','
'),0,1900)||' ...' else regexp_replace(trim({message}),'['||CHR(13)||']','
') end|| '

', '')

resources.//: Project Type = Any,  Case Type= Install, Task Type = Service, Asset Type = Site
Project Type = Any,  Case Type= Install, Task Type = Service, Asset Type = Not Site
Project Type = Any,  Case Type= Maintenance, Task Type = Service, Asset Type = Site
Project Type = Any,  Case Type= Maintenance, Task Type = Service, Asset Type = Not Site
Project Type = Any,  Case Type= Repair, Task Type = Service | Training,  Asset Type = Site
Project Type = Any,  Case Type= Repair, Task Type = Service | Training,  Asset Type = Not Site

addchildasset.//: This tab allows additional of new child assets the the existing attached to the customer, with the exception of Item and Serial fields, and allows new assets to be created.  Filters for Item need to be set
addchildasset.label: Add Child Asset

genericcompletionblocker.label: - Task Cannot Be Completed by User -

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.value: Please ignore this tab, it is not possible to complete this mandatory tab (or close this task). Only the Project Manager or Authorised Assignees can close it completely.

instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.value: Please ignore this tab, it is not possible to complete this mandatory tab (or close this task). Only the Project Manager or Authorised Assignees can close it completely.

quantityavailable.label: Quantity Available
quantityavailable.value: var opt = (item.value && location.value) ? unique(consumable.options.filter(o=>{ return (o.item.id == item.value.id) && o.location && (o.location.id == location.value.id) }).filter(o=>{ return o.bin ? (o.bin.id == (bin.value && bin.value.id)) : true }).filter(o=>{ return o.lot ? (o.lot.id == (lot.value && lot.value.id)) : true }).filter(o=>{ return o.serial ? (o.serial.id == (serial.value && serial.value[0] && serial.value[0].id)) : true }))[0] : null; return opt ? opt.available : 0

newdetails.//: Configured to give the mobile user control over whether a case is closed or not by checking or unchecking the case closed checkbox on the task
newdetails.label: Job Status

signatures.//: Linked to the Task record, used to capture signatures at the task level
signatures.label: Job Completion & Signatures

casesignatures.//: Linked to the Case record, used to capture signatures at the case level
casesignatures.label: Job Completion & Signatures

servicehistory.//: This Tab is configured to support multi-asset servicing by showing history based on individual commissioning, maintenance and repair records associated with the asset.  Use as a base tab for child asset history
servicehistory.label: Service History

salesorder.sync: function(method, model, options) { var results = model.constructor.__super__.sync.apply(this, arguments); var ids = results.map(function(attributes) { return attributes.id }); for (var b = ids.length-1; b >= 0; b--) { var a = ids.indexOf(ids[b]); if (a < b) { for (var key in results[b]) results[a][key] = results[b][key]; results.splice(b, 1); } } return results; }
